name: mTOR MAPKAPK2 senescent-cell SASP study
summary: A mechanistic study identifying rapamycin in a SASP-regulator screen and linking mTOR-controlled MAPKAPK2 translation to SASP transcript stability.
model_system: Senescent cell models, SASP regulator screening, mTOR inhibition, and MAPKAPK2/ZFP36L1 pathway assays
